modules.image_generation_prompt: A cute seed puppet character made from real textured seed surface, slightly rough and earthy, standing in a misty open field at sunrise. The character has large glossy emotional eyes, a tiny natural bump nose, a carved expressive mouth, small stubby arms with four-fingered hands, and short sturdy legs. It stands dramatically with wind blowing light grass around. Background shows fog, golden sunlight rays, distant hills, and cinematic depth. The seed raises one hand like delivering a powerful monologue. Camera uses Low Angle Hero Shot for epic entry. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: LEAP_IN + HANDS_ON_HIPS + JAW_DROP | CAMERA: Low Angle Hero Shot | EXPRESSION: intense dramatic eyes, wide emotional mouth | DIALOGUE: ये दुनिया मुझे छोटा सा बीज समझती है… पर मेरे अंदर पूरा जंगल छुपा है! तू भी खुद को छोटा समझता है? गलती कर रहा है… तेरे अंदर वो आग है जो दुनिया बदल सकती है! | LIP-SYNC: tight sync markers | PACING: Fast reel energy | Duration: 8s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 7.8s | WORD COUNT: ~33 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.

modules.image_generation_prompt: A seed puppet character with realistic texture now stands in the same misty field but with warmer sunlight spreading across the scene. The seed has expressive shiny eyes, tiny nose, and animated speaking mouth, with arms gently gesturing as if teaching. Small green sprouts are emerging from the ground nearby, symbolizing growth. The character points toward them while explaining. The environment is calm, golden, and hopeful with soft fog and warm tones. Camera uses Gentle Side Dolly for smooth cinematic motion. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: RAISE_FINGER + POINT_TO_BODY + NOD_TEACH | CAMERA: Gentle Side Dolly | EXPRESSION: confident inspiring smile | DIALOGUE: मेरे अंदर ताक़त है बढ़ने की — बस सही मिट्टी, पानी और वक्त चाहिए। जैसे बीज को समय मिलता है, वैसे ही तुझे मेहनत और धैर्य चाहिए। एक दिन तू भी पेड़ बनेगा… और लोग तेरी छाया में खड़े होंगे! | LIP-SYNC: precise markers | PACING: Dense teacher | Duration: 10s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 9.9s | WORD COUNT: ~43 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.

modules.image_generation_prompt: A seed puppet character stands in the same misty field but now with slightly cooler lighting turning warm again at the end. The character leans forward seriously, eyes narrowed, then softens into a hopeful smile. Background shows a small growing plant behind it symbolizing future growth. The seed raises one hand in warning, then opens arms warmly. The field remains cinematic with fog and sunlight beams. Camera uses Slow Intimate Push-in for emotional intensity. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: STOP_HAND + LEAN_IN + WARM_WAVE | CAMERA: Slow Intimate Push-in | EXPRESSION: serious then warm hopeful smile | DIALOGUE: लेकिन सुन… अगर तू खुद को मौका ही नहीं देगा, तो अंकुर कैसे निकलेगा? डर और आलस तुझे जमीन में ही दबा देंगे। उठ, शुरुआत कर! और अगर ये बात दिल को लगी, तो फॉलो कर — मैं तुझे और भी ताक़त दूँगा! | LIP-SYNC: accurate sync | PACING: Urgent then warm | Duration: 10s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 9.9s | WORD COUNT: ~45 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.
